title: Tower REITs, Carriers And Lead-Sheathed Cables
text: Market reaction appears significantly overdone with regard to concerns tied to lead-sheathed cables. In one day, market cap for carriers was down $20 billion. For tower REITs, down $8 billion. The cost of leasing space from the tower REITs is not substantial. The big costs are equipment and spectrum. Slower growth for now? Maybe. Shrinking footprint? Very unlikely.
